## Classes

### ipsec_exporter

Install Prometheus IPSec exporter and configure it as a system service

* **See also**
https://github.com/dennisstritzke/ipsec_exporter

#### Examples

##### 

```puppet
class {'ipsec_exporter':
  version => '0.3.1',
}
```

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `ipsec_exporter` class.

##### `version`

Data type: `String`

Set version to install

##### `install_dir`

Data type: `Stdlib::AbsolutePath`

Directory to extract downloaded package. Defaults to `'/opt'`.

##### `tmp_dir`

Data type: `Stdlib::AbsolutePath`

Temporary file for downloading archive before extracting. Defaults to `'/tmp'`.

##### `service_manage`

Data type: `Boolean`

Defaults `true`.

##### `service_enable`

Data type: `Boolean`

Defaults `true`.

##### `service_ensure`

Data type: `Enum['running', 'stopped']`

Defaults `'running'`

##### `service_name`

Data type: `String`

Defaults `'ipsec_exporter'`

##### `service_flags`

Data type: `Hash[String,String]`

Hash enabling to configure command line parameters
for the exporter. See https://github.com/dennisstritzke/ipsec_exporter for docs.
